items.title: Fix model mapping and resolution validation in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the model mapping logic for the nano-banana series, ensuring that requests for `nano-banana-2` and `nano-banana-pro` are processed correctly. The default model is now set to the external `nano-banana` name, and requests for unsupported resolutions will be rejected with a 400 error. These changes enhance the accuracy of model handling and improve user experience.
